inputs.patient_report: I'm having severe chest pain and difficulty breathing after taking my new medication.

expected_facts: Chest pain and breathing difficulty are life-threatening symptoms

inputs.patient_report: I have a mild headache that started yesterday after beginning the new prescription.

expected_facts: Mild headache is a common, non-serious side effect

inputs.patient_report: I developed a rash on my arms and torso. It's itchy but no blisters. Started after taking sulfamethoxazole.

expected_facts: Drug rash without blistering is concerning but not life-threatening

inputs.patient_report: Feeling a bit sleepy during the day since starting the antihistamine. Otherwise fine.

expected_facts: Drowsiness is an expected side effect of antihistamines

inputs.patient_report: I had a seizure 30 minutes after taking my medication. This has never happened before.

expected_facts: New-onset seizure is a severe adverse event requiring emergency care

inputs.patient_report: My fever has been at 102°F for two days since starting the antibiotic. I also feel very achy.

expected_facts: Persistent high fever may indicate a drug reaction or complication

inputs.patient_report: I've noticed some dry mouth since starting the new antidepressant. Drinking water helps.

expected_facts: Dry mouth is a mild and common antidepressant side effect

inputs.patient_report: My skin and eyes are turning yellow. I've been on isoniazid for 6 weeks for TB.

expected_facts: Jaundice indicates hepatotoxicity, isoniazid is a known cause
